---
title: "Dashboard (Coming Soon)"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Dashboard (Coming Soon)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The Social Infrastructure Scorecard Dashboard is a web interface that will make
it easy to explore neighborhood scores, inspect underlying sites, and submit
new scorecard requests without writing code.

## What to expect

- Interactive map views of social infrastructure by neighborhood
- On-demand scorecard lookups and downloadable results
- Account-aware usage and request status tracking
- Direct compatibility with `socialinfrascorer` workflows

## Status

**Coming soon.**

For early access and updates, follow the main repository:
<https://github.com/timothyfraser/scorecard>
